narrative:
Smithfield Twp township has 1,894 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.5 percentage points.
